problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: The key to What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? is Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer — specifically Enzymatic depolymerization of — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
